models.name: Parakeet-TDT 1.1B

models.author: nvidia

models.name: Parakeet-TDT 0.6B V2
models.description: FastConformer-TDT 0.6B V2 — 3,386 RTFx (fastest open ASR), word timestamps, English only. Requires nemo_toolkit[asr].
models.author: nvidia

models.name: Canary-Qwen 2.5B
models.description: Canary-Qwen 2.5B — state-of-the-art WER 5.63%, RTFx 418, FastConformer + Qwen3 decoder. Requires nemo_toolkit[asr].
models.author: nvidia

models.name: WhisperX Large-v3
models.description: Whisper Large-v3 with WhisperX — accurate word-level timestamps via wav2vec2 forced alignment, 99+ languages.
models.author: Systran

models.description: Whisper Large-v3 Turbo with WhisperX — 8x faster than large-v3, accurate word-level timestamps, 99+ languages.

models.name: Qwen3 Omni 30B A3B Instruct (STT)
models.description: Qwen3-Omni 30B multimodal model — speech recognition via omni-modal architecture. MoE with 3B active params. Requires: pip install qwen-omni-utils
models.author: Qwen

models.name: Qwen3 Omni 30B A3B Instruct (TTS)
models.description: Qwen3-Omni 30B multimodal model — text-to-speech via omni-modal architecture. MoE with 3B active params. Built-in speakers: Ethan, Chelsie. Requires: pip install qwen-omni-utils
models.author: Qwen

models.name: Chatterbox TTS
models.description: Chatterbox TTS — zero-shot voice cloning, emotion exaggeration control, outperforms ElevenLabs. Requires: pip install chatterbox-tts
models.author: ResembleAI

models.name: Chatterbox Turbo
models.description: Chatterbox Turbo — 1-step generation for ultra-low latency voice agents, paralinguistic tags ([laugh], [cough]). Requires: pip install chatterbox-tts
models.author: ResembleAI

models.name: XTTS-v2
models.description: XTTS-v2 — zero-shot 17-language voice cloning with 6s reference audio, <200ms latency streaming. Requires: pip install TTS
models.author: coqui

models.name: Fish Speech 1.5
models.description: Fish Speech 1.5 — natural dialogue, 13 languages, 1M+ hours training data. Requires: pip install fish-speech (CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0)
models.author: fishaudio

models.name: Orpheus TTS 3B
models.description: Orpheus TTS 3B — Llama backbone, ~200ms streaming latency, human-like speech with emotion. See https://github.com/canopyai/Orpheus-TTS
models.author: canopylabs

models.name: Dia 1.6B
models.description: Dia 1.6B — ultra-realistic multi-speaker dialogue in one pass, non-verbal sounds (laughs, coughs), voice conditioning. Requires: pip install dia-tts
models.author: nari-labs

models.name: Dia2 2B
models.description: Dia2 2B — streaming dialogue TTS, generates audio in real-time without full text upfront. Requires: pip install dia-tts
models.author: nari-labs

models.name: Voxtral Mini Realtime
models.description: Mistral Voxtral-Mini 4B real-time STT — 13 languages, <500ms latency. Requires: uv pip install mistral-common
models.author: mistralai

models.name: Voxtral TTS
models.description: Mistral Voxtral 4B TTS — 20 preset voices, 9 languages, 24 kHz. Requires a running vLLM server: vllm serve mistralai/Voxtral-4B-TTS-2603 --omni. License: CC BY-NC 4.0 (non-commercial).
models.author: mistralai

models.name: OmniVoice
models.description: OmniVoice — zero-shot voice cloning and voice design TTS for 600+ languages. RTF ~0.025 on GPU. Supports non-verbal symbols and pronunciation hints.
models.author: k2-fsa
